results.rendered_html:
dyumat a.
1 Bright, brilliant.
2 Clear, loud.
3 Strong, vigorous.
4 Calm, serene.
Comp.
— gānaṃ a mode of chanting the Sāmaveda.
— senaḥ N. of a king of Śālva, and father of Satyavat, husband of Sāvitrī.
